opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I stand, my legs turn completely purple and throb with pain, the room spins, and my vision goes black.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared over the last day — my legs go dark purple and I nearly faint standing, so I can't get to the kitchen.

symptom_narrative.character: legs go dark purple and ache, dizziness and vision blacking out on standing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: only upright; resolves instantly lying/legs up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down and elevating my legs settles it instantly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: brain fog and near-syncope; I crawl to the bathroom
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have neuropathic POTS and get pooling, but this is severe

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can't stand long enough to prepare food

communication_style.typical_message_style: coherent but slowed, describes the pooling and near-faints clearly

objective_data_offered.value: around 110/70 lying and ~90/60 standing on my home cuff
both legs go dark purple when I stand and go normal instantly when I lie back with legs up
